ground_truth.title: US Plumbing Fixtures & Fittings Report
ground_truth.main_content:
- Market Size, Market Share | Freedonia Group. An in-depth look at the $18 billion US plumbing fixtures & fittings industry with demand forecasts through 2029 by type, material, and market.

Report Overview: Plumbing Fixtures in Demand: The Impact of Renovations, Water Efficiency, and Smart Technology on the Market's Future.

Key Themes Covered in this Report:

- Rising demand for water-efficient, eco-friendly, and smart plumbing fixtures, driven by concerns over water scarcity, sustainability trends, and the growing adoption of smart home technologies.

- Increasing interest in touchless and hygienic plumbing products due to heightened sanitation awareness, particularly in both residential and commercial spaces.

- Opportunities from aging infrastructure replacement, renovation projects, and luxury upgrades, alongside a growing e-commerce shift and consumer preference for customized plumbing solutions.

- Regulatory pressures and advancements in material innovation are driving product development, with a focus on durability, sustainability, and compliance with water and energy-efficiency standards.

Featuring 97 Tables & 63 Figures!

Table of Contents includes: Executive Summary, Short-Term Analysis (Economic Forecast, Construction Outlook, Plumbing Industry Trends), Overview (Study Scope, Historical Market Trends, Supply & Demand, Markets Overview, Pricing Trends), Factors Impacting Plumbing Product Demand (Building Construction Outlook, Housing Stock, Home Remodeling, Design Trends, Building Codes, Sustainability, Water Conservation, Skilled Labor, Installation Costs), Plumbing Fixture Products (Scope, Bathtub & Shower Fixtures, Toilets & Urinals, Kitchen Faucets & Sinks, Bathroom Faucets & Sinks, Other Fixtures), Plumbing Fitting Products, Manufacturing, Product substitutes, North American Industry Leaders, Methodology, and more chapters covering markets, product forecasts, and industry structure.
